mapper.sql: SELECT a.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_risk_assessment_detail d WHERE d.risk_id = a.risk_id) AS detail_count FROM tb_risk_assessment a
mapper.select: ORDER BY a.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_risk_assessment WHERE site = #{site}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_risk_assessment WHERE status = #{status}
WHERE a.office_count > 0 ORDER BY a.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
WHERE a.site = #{site} AND a.office_count > 0 ORDER BY a.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
WHERE a.status = #{status} AND a.office_count > 0 ORDER BY a.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_risk_assessment WHERE office_count > 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_risk_assessment WHERE site = #{site} AND office_count > 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_risk_assessment WHERE status = #{status} AND office_count > 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_risk_assessment WHERE form_id = #{formId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_risk_assessment ( form_id, form_title, risk_id, title, title_en, title_zh, site, author_name, author_dept, author_mail, approver_name, approver_mail, plan_approver_user_id, plan_approver_team, plan_approver_position, plan_approver_name, completion_approver_user_id, completion_approver_team, completion_approver_position, completion_approver_name, status, risk_register_count, office_count, field_count, allow_resubmit, office_checklist_id, sanup_checklist_id, jungdae_checklist_id, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{formId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{formTitle}, #{riskId}, #{title}, #{titleEn}, #{titleZh}, #{site}, #{authorName}, #{authorDept}, #{authorMail}, #{approverName}, #{approverMail}, #{planApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planApproverTeam}, #{planApproverPosition}, #{planApproverName}, #{completionApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{completionApproverTeam}, #{completionApproverPosition}, #{completionApproverName}, #{status}, #{riskRegisterCount}, #{officeCount}, #{fieldCount}, #{allowResubmit}, #{officeChecklistId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sanupChecklistId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{jungdaeChecklistId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_risk_assessment SET form_id = #{formId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, form_title = #{formTitle}, title = #{title}, title_en = #{titleEn}, title_zh = #{titleZh}, site = #{site}, author_name = #{authorName}, author_dept = #{authorDept}, author_mail = #{authorMail}, approver_name = #{approverName}, approver_mail = #{approverMail}, plan_approver_user_id = #{planApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, plan_approver_team = #{planApproverTeam}, plan_approver_position = #{planApproverPosition}, plan_approver_name = #{planApproverName}, completion_approver_user_id = #{completionApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, completion_approver_team = #{completionApproverTeam}, completion_approver_position = #{completionApproverPosition}, completion_approver_name = #{completionApproverName}, office_checklist_id = #{officeChecklistId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sanup_checklist_id = #{sanupChecklistId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, jungdae_checklist_id = #{jungdaeChecklistId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tb_risk_assessment SET status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, allow_resubmit = #{allowResubmit}, completed_date = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'completed' THEN GETDATE() ELSE completed_date END, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tb_risk_assessment SET status = #{status}, plan_approved_at = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'PLAN' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN GETDATE() ELSE plan_approved_at END, plan_approved_by = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'PLAN' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN #{approvedBy} ELSE plan_approved_by END, completion_approved_at = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'COMPLETION' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN GETDATE() ELSE completion_approved_at END, completion_approved_by = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'COMPLETION' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN #{approvedBy} ELSE completion_approved_by END, completed_date = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'completed' THEN GETDATE() ELSE completed_date END, reject_reason = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'rejected' THEN #{rejectReason} ELSE reject_reason END, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_risk_assessment SET office_count = #{officeCount}, field_count = #{fieldCount}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE risk_id = #{riskId}
UPDATE tb_risk_assessment SET risk_register_count = #{count}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE risk_id = #{riskId}
